title: Unions, Unknown Values, and Control-Flow Narrowing · Contract Lens: Union Common Operations
summary: Convert an unknown status feed into trusted records using evidence-producing guards and exhaustive decisions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts union common operations increment in an unknown-to-domain validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use only operations valid for every union member until evidence supports narrowing.
Use lowercase primitive types and distinguish them from boxed wrapper object types.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
